revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-4-150

A phase-meter used for the display of Decca position-line information within a pattern.

The readings of a decometer and the lane identification meter together determine the line of position on which the craft lies.

Reference: B.S. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
